args.description: Read source code architecture (all .rs files under src/)
Read source code architecture (all .rs files under src/)
Self-test (cargo build, cargo test, binary run)
Write assessment to session_plan/assessment.md and commit

args.command: cd /home/runner/work/yyds-harness/yyds-harness && wc -l src/*.rs src/format/*.rs | sort -rn | head -30
cd /home/runner/work/yyds-harness/yyds-harness && wc -l src/*.rs src/format/*.rs | sort -rn | head -30

cd /home/runner/work/yyds-harness/yyds-harness && gh issue list --repo yologdev/yyds-harness --label agent-self --limit 10 --json number,title,state,updatedAt 2>&1
cd /home/runner/work/yyds-harness/yyds-harness && timeout 30 cargo test --test integration -- --quiet 2>&1 | tail -15

cd /home/runner/work/yyds-harness/yyds-harness && timeout 30 cargo test --test integration -- --quiet 2>&1 | grep -E "(FAILED|test result)" | tail -10
